title: American Lung Association in Nevada’s Scale The STRAT Fight for Air Climb is February 22, 2026
author: American Lung Association In Nevada
description: The American Lung Association will host Scale The STRAT, a stair climbing fundraising event at The STRAT Hotel in Las Vegas, where participants will climb 1,455 stairs to support lung health research and education.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as owner of The STRAT Hotel with no direct involvement in the fundraising event
